figures.caption: Table 3: Rating Prediction Performance Comparison Across Datasets. “R” means RMSE, and “M” means MAE.

Table 2: Explainability and Stability results on Three Datasets. "↑" means higher is better; "↓" means lower is better. Superscripts “P,” “R,” and “F1” denote Precision, Recall, and F1-Score, respectively. The subscript “std” indicates the standard deviation of each metric. Bold indicates the best results, while underlined denotes the second-best. (The significant improvements with p-value < 0.05 based on paired t-tests)
Fig. 1: The overview framework of Curr-RLCER.
